kubernetes_cluster_name.description: Specifies the name of the Kubernetes cluster to associate with the node pool; must match an existing cluster name.

name.description: Specifies the name of the node pool; must be unique within the Kubernetes cluster and comply with Azure's naming conventions.

timeouts.description: Defines custom timeouts for create, update, and delete operations on the Kubernetes cluster node pool.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.
